data.title: Clean Elections Partners with the Arizona Agenda on Legislative Debates
data.description: In Phoenix on March 25, 2026, Clean Elections, the exclusive non-partisan voter education organization in Arizona authorized to conduct candidate debates, revealed a fresh collaboration with Arizona Agenda. The main goal of this alliance is to enhance visibility and availability of Arizona's legislative debates.

data.title: FDA Approves Corcept’s Selective Glucocorticoid Receptor Antagonist Lifyorli™ (relacorilant) Plus Nab-Paclitaxel for Treatment of Patients with Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer
data.description: Corcept Therapeutics, a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol CORT, based in Redwood City, California, focuses on developing medications for various disorders by regulating cortisol effects. Recently, the U.S. FDA authorized Lifyorli™ (relacorilant) combined with nab-paclitaxel for treating adults with platinum-resistant epitheli tumors. This approval marks a significant milestone for the firm in the medical field.

data.title: Thompson Hine Launches SmartPaTH Plus, a Comprehensive Legal Service Delivery Platform Powered by AI
data.description: In Cleveland, Thompson Hine LLP unveiled SmartPaTH Plus, a new legal service platform intertwining legal project management, flexible staffing, value-based pricing, process efficiency, and AI tools. This innovative model, developed over more than 12 years, merges various elements into a unified system. The platform, which has integrated AI tools into almost 100 common tasks, marks a substantial leap in the firm's commitment to process enhancement, data analysis, and technology.

EU Ambassador to the US: US LNG exports to the EU will increase over time, up to 57-60% in the next few years.

data.title: Autel U.S. ADAS Training Program Achieves ASE and I-CAR Accreditation
data.description: Autel U.S., a prominent automotive diagnostic tools and ADAS solutions provider based in Port Washington, New York, revealed that its Autel Academy ADAS Training Program received accreditation from the National Institute on March 25, 2026. The program aims to enhance knowledge and skills in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems.

data.title: Corsha Named 2025 TMCnet Zero Trust Security Excellence Award Winner
data.description: Corsha has been recognized as the sole awardee dedicated to safeguarding Operational Technology (OT) in Washington. On March 25, 2026, Corsha, a specialized Machine Identity Provider for operational systems, revealed its selection as the recipient of the 2025 Zero Trust Security award. This acknowledgment underscores Corsha's commitment to enhancing security measures for OT.

data.title: First Horizon Bank Welcomes Meghan Donelon as Commercial Banking Group Manager in New Orleans
data.description: On March 25, 2026, a notable bank (NYSE: FHN) in New Orleans welcomed Meghan Donelon back to its Commercial Banking team as a Group Manager. With a wealth of leadership experience and deep community ties, her return is seen as a significant asset to the bank's operations.

data.title: QUADIENT: Quadient FY 2025 results: Revenue of €1,036m, current EBIT margin at 13.0%
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, Quadient reported a revenue of €1,036 million with a current EBIT margin of 13.0%. The company has raised its ambition for its Digital sector, aiming for it to become Quadient's largest and most profitable solution by the year 2030.
EU AMBASSADOR TO THE US STATES THAT THERE IS NO POSSIBILITY OF RETURNING TO RUSSIAN GAS DUE TO THE MIDDLE EAST CRISIS.

data.title: 22nd Century Technologies Introduces Payment Gateway, a First-of-Its-Kind Policy-Powered Treasury Optimization Platform
data.description: A recently launched platform is enabling treasury teams in commercial and public sectors to optimize account balances for increased revenue generation. The platform was introduced by 22nd Century Technologies, Inc. (TSCTI), a prominent company specializing in digital transformation and enterprise technology solutions for public entities. This new offering has the potential to significantly impact financial strategies by leveraging account balances effectively.

data.title: McLaren Racing Joins Hedera Council to Accelerate Digital Innovation
data.description: McLaren Racing has recently become a member of the Hedera Council, the authoritative body of Hedera, which is based in Surrey, England. This move coincides with the introduction of the initial Hedera-powered application, with additional projects in fan engagement, digital assets, and data integrity in the pipeline. The council's membership expansion signifies a notable milestone, considering its impact on the Hedera ecosystem. This development holds great significance for both organizations involved and signifies potential growth and collaboration in the future.

data.title: NVIDIA's DRIVE Radar tech offers 100x more data for L4 autonomy, reducing hardware expenses by 30%.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced centralized radar processing on DRIVE AGX Thor, providing a significant boost of 100 times more sensor data for Level 4 autonomous vehicles. This advancement also results in a remarkable 30% reduction in hardware expenses.

data.title: Thoropass Releases 2026 State of Audit And Compliance Report: AI Emerges as the Top Compliance and Audit Risk
data.description: In New York, Thoropass unveiled its 2026 State of Audit and Compliance Report, indicating a surge in AI adoption as the leading source of IT security compliance risk. Nearly 70% of security and compliance leaders acknowledge that AI adoption is surpassing their current security and compliance safeguards, highlighting an expanding governance void. The report, derived from a survey encompassing over 500 security, IT, and compliance experts, demonstrates that compliance initiatives are...

data.title: State and Local Governments Turn to Box to Modernize Workflows with Secure AI
data.description: In California, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) showcased at its State and Local Government Virtual Summit how state and local governments are utilizing its Intelligent Content Management platform. The event emphasized the impact of secure, AI-powered content on operations. The City and County of Denver shared their experience using Box as an AI-powered content management system to enhance case workflows. This transformation has led to quicker, more secure, and efficient processes.

data.title: Lutzie 43 Foundation Partners with the Governor's Office of Highway Safety to Bring Safe Driving Summit to Two Oconee County High Schools
data.description: A Safe Driving Summit will take place at Oconee County High School in Atlanta on March 25, 2026. Students will receive training on road safety to prevent distracted, impaired, and unsafe driving. The event is organized by the Lutzie 43 Foundation and the Governor's Office of Highway Safety. This initiative aims to equip students with essential lifesaving skills.

data.title: LangChain introduces shareable AI skills for LangSmith Fleet; Teams can now codify company knowledge for tasks across workspaces.
data.description: The LangSmith Fleet has launched a new feature that allows teams to develop and distribute reusable AI agent skills. This initiative aims to capture company insights and expertise for specific functions within various workspaces. The AI agent skills can be easily shared among team members, promoting efficiency and consistency in task execution.
